29.reason: [In BFS, when exploring neighbors of 'tmp', the code incorrectly uses 'v' (the original start vertex) instead of 'tmp'. This causes wrong adjacency checks and leads to incorrect traversal.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [In BFS, when exploring neighbors of 'tmp', the code incorrectly uses 'v' (the original start vertex) instead of 'tmp'. This causes wrong adjacency checks and leads to incorrect traversal.]
